headings.description: Use Clash Display for a strong, engineered, industrial look. Alternatively, Cabinet Grotesk or Anton.

body.description: IBM Plex Sans fits the technical 'metal fabrication' angle perfectly.

layout_spacing.description: Use wide gap-8/gap-12 for bento grids on marketing side. Use tight gap-4/gap-6 for the admin control room grid. Avoid generic symmetry.

components_instructions.hero: Use Three.js (@react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei). Create an interactive 3D background with dark ambient lighting, an abstract or literal iron gate model, and orange 'Sparkles' mimicking welding sparks. Overlay text with large headings.
components_instructions.buttons: Square edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Hover state must have a high contrast background (e.g., bg-[#FF5A00] text-black) and scale slightly.
components_instructions.cards: Flat background (bg-[#1A1A1D]), sharp edges or minimal radius (rounded-sm max). Include a 1px subtle border (border-white/10). On hover, transition border to border-[#FF5A00]/50 and add slight -translate-y-1.
components_instructions.forms: Use Shadcn customized for dark industrial. Input backgrounds #0A0A0B, borders #27272A, text white. Ring focus to be #FF5A00. Make them strictly functional.
components_instructions.admin_panel: Dense, functional UI. Sidebar nav. High-contrast data tables using Shadcn table. Cardless layout where possible, relying on 1px borders to separate rows.
components_instructions.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='submit-offer-btn').

visual_enhancers: Use framer-motion for staggering list items and fade-up on scroll.
Apply a subtle noise texture overlay or black brushed metal texture to the background to give a 'gritty/machined' feel.
Add 'tracing beam' or glowing border effect to active portfolio items or primary service cards to make them pop out of the dark.

hero_sparks.description: Welding fire and sparks in the dark

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard JS/JSX files for React (not TSX files as this is a JS codebase).

For the hero, implement @react-three/fiber with a dark scene, adding sparks using <Sparkles /> component, and a basic iron gate geometry or imported model. The user specifically asked for '3D iron gate opening and welding sparks animation'.
Ensure max contrast in the UI. No soft gradients, rely on solid flat colors with sharp borders.
Align text to the left for large paragraphs to maintain the engineered precision look. Center align is fine for short headers.
Implement the offer request form using customized Shadcn UI components. Ensure all inputs are accessible with proper labels.
For the Admin panel, design a 'Control Room' dense layout. Everything functional, no wasted space. Use Shadcn tables for viewing Offer Requests and Contact Messages.
